prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约197→97→85→85→99，2021年位次较高（197名），2022年起大幅前移至97名，2023–2024年稳定在85名，2025年略后移至99名；近3年基准位次约85–99名区间，2025年基准约99名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划：2021–2024年均为24人，2025年增至34人（+10人），2026年计划40人，较2025年再增6人（+17.6%）；连续两年扩招，计划增量显著，按供需弹性推算竞争略有缓解，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续位居全国第2名，属顶尖层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全、食堂宿舍等事件），但北大作为顶尖名校，声誉波动对报考热度影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度持续高位；历史投档异常记录中2025年有高关注事件（湖北提前批首次出现空档等），可能对当年报考心理产生一定滞后影响；北京大学拥有大量A+学科（如数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、法学、经济学、中国语言文学等），A-及以上学科远超10个，学科实力顶尖，对物理类考生报考各专业均有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类相关热门专业（计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等）2026年社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；广东省物理类考生2021年337,988→2025年440,208→2026年456,000人，考生规模持续扩大（2026年较2025年+3.6%），竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）2021年432→2025年436分，波动不大；北京大学位于北京，非本省高校；广东省为生源大省，北大在粤招生人数近年持续增加（物理类2021年24人→2025年34人→2026年40人），跨省报考热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年基准约99名、2026年计划大幅扩招17.6%（位次后移压力）、物理类考生增加3.6%（竞争略加剧）、北大顶尖层次与高热抖音关注度（报考热度不减）；考虑扩招影响部分被名校效应和考生增加抵消，小幅回调5名，预测最低位次约104名，区间92–116名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 197 → 97 → 85 → 85 → 99. In 2021, the ranking was relatively high (197th), but from 2022 onward, it moved significantly forward to 97th. It stabilized at 85th in 2023–2024, then slightly shifted back to 99th in 2025. The baseline ranking over the past three years is approximately 85–99, with the 2025 baseline around 99th. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong: 24 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 34 students in 2025 (+10), and planned 40 students in 2026, an increase of 6 students (+17.6%) compared to 2025. With two consecutive years of enrollment expansion and a significant increase in planned slots, competition is slightly eased according to supply-demand elasticity, putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 2nd nationally in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, placing it at the top tier and strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluations are somewhat negative (due to incidents involving campus safety, dormitories, and cafeterias), but as a top-tier prestigious university, the impact of reputation fluctuations on application enthusiasm is limited. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking: 3rd (high heat), with large short video exposure, maintaining high application attention. Historical abnormal admission records include a high-attention event in 2025 (e.g., first vacancy in Hubei early batch), which may have a lagging psychological effect on that year's applications. Peking University has numerous A+ disciplines (e.g., Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature), with far more than 10 disciplines rated A- or above. Its disciplinary strength is top-tier, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates to apply for various majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors related to Physics Category (e.g., Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, Electrical Engineering) remain hot/highly recommended in 2026. The number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong: 337,988 in 2021 → 440,208 in 2025 → 456,000 in 2026, with continuous expansion (2026 vs. 2025: +3.6%), intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) fluctuated little: 432 in 2021 → 436 in 2025. Peking University is located in Beijing, not a local university. Guangdong is a major source province, and the number of students Peking University enrolls in Guangdong has been increasing in recent years (Physics Category: 24 in 2021 → 34 in 2025 → 40 in 2026), with cross-provincial application enthusiasm remaining high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking baseline of approximately 99th in 2025, a significant enrollment expansion of 17.6% in 2026 (putting downward pressure on ranking), a 3.6% increase in Physics Category candidates (slightly intensifying competition), and Peking University's top-tier status and high Douyin attention (sustained application enthusiasm), the impact of expansion is partially offset by the prestigious university effect and increased candidate numbers. With a slight adjustment of 5 places backward, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 104th, with a range of 92–116.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligence Science and Technology)
- Mathematics Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Biological Science Class
- Physics Class (including Physics, Atmospheric Science)
- Science Experimental Class (Guanghua)
- Chemistry Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Electronic Information Class (including Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (including Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Engineering Mechanics, etc.)
- Environmental Science (Environment, Health, Ecology, Geography and Resource Environment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 92–116, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 92), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 flagship majors (Yuanpei, Computer Science, Mathematics). If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 116), you should mainly consider Tier 3 Electronic Information/Engineering Experimental Class majors and be cautious about stretching for Tier 1.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 29→28→(no data for 2023)→35→28, fluctuating narrowly within the 28–35 range; the baseline for 2025 is about 28, with a fluctuation range of ±7 in recent two years; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong History Category: 22 students in both 2021 and 2022, 23 students in both 2024 and 2025, and 24 students planned for 2026, a slight expansion of 1 student (+4.3%) compared to 2025; the expansion is small, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 2nd nationally in the Shanghai Ranking from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier, with strong appeal to high-scoring History Category candidates; in 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety, dormitory incidents, etc.), but as a top university, reputation fluctuations have limited impact on application enthusiasm; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 3rd (high heat), with large short video exposure, maintaining high application attention; historical abnormal admission records in 2025 include high-attention events (first vacancy in Hubei early batch, etc.), which may have a lagging effect on application psychology; Peking University's History Category-related advantageous disciplines are extremely strong: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Chinese History A+, Philosophy A+, Archaeology A+, Journalism and Communication A-, etc., with top-tier academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors related to History Category (Law, Chinese Language/Literature) have a social popularity of hot/recommended in 2026; the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong increased from 269,209 in 2021 to 292,200 in 2025 and 326,200 in 2026, with continuous expansion (2026 vs 2025 +11.6%), significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose slightly from 448 in 2021 to 464 in 2025; Peking University is located in Beijing, not a local university; Guangdong is a major source province, and the number of History Category admissions by Peking University in Guangdong has increased slightly in recent years (22 in 2021 to 24 in 2026), with stable cross-province application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical ranking baseline of about 28 in 2025, a slight expansion of 4.3% in 2026 (ranking slightly shifted back), a significant increase of 11.6% in History Category candidates (competition notably intensified), Peking University's top tier and high Douyin attention (application enthusiasm undiminished); considering the competitive pressure from the surge in candidates, slightly adjust upward by 1, predicting a minimum ranking of about 30, with a range of 26–34.
